6.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 6.0 command indexes.

7.0.reason: Not listed in the official FLAC3D 7.0 contents command index.

keywords.name: parallel
keywords.description: Keep cross-sections parallel to the construction plane.

keywords.name: perpendicular
keywords.description: Keep cross-sections perpendicular to the extrusion path and constant in size.

keywords.name: adjusted
keywords.description: Keep rotated cross-sections (adjusted to the next segment) and constant in size.
